regions.text: The more languages you hear and get to know, the more you will see how any language is made up of a small number of sounds put together in different ways. For example, in English, light and right are different words with only one sound in them different.
Turn to the right / at the light. The wrong way / a long way. If a learner does not hear these different sounds as different, he may not get the meaning of what is said to him.
turn: make a turn. ah: a cry not a word.
FUTURE: will turn. PRESENT: turn(s). PAST: turned.
